scanType: Focused scan: AI Tools and Models watchlist
summary: Anthropic accidentally leaked 'Claude Mythos' (codename Capybara), a new tier ABOVE Opus. Dramatically better at coding, reasoning, and cybersecurity. Currently piloting with select customers for cybersecurity defense. No public release or pricing yet.

Claude Code updated to v2.1.76 in March 2026: /loop command (recurring tasks), /voice mode (push-to-talk), Computer Use preview, 1M context window, Opus 4.6 default, max output increased to 64K (128K upper bound). Rate limit drain bug reported March 26.
OpenAI released GPT-5.4 (March 5): 1M token context, record benchmark scores, 33% fewer claim errors vs GPT-5.2. Codex broad release (March 27) with plugins and multi-agent workflows.
Google Gemini 3.1 Pro ties GPT-5.4 Pro at top of AI Intelligence Index (57 points). Gemini 3.1 Flash Live in preview for real-time multimodal voice/video.
Meta delayed 'Avocado' model from March to May 2026 minimum; cannot match competitor performance. May license Google Gemini instead.

workstreamTags.BUILD: Claude Code /loop and Computer Use could automate more of our CI/CD and monitoring. Worth exploring.
workstreamTags.ADVISOR: Claude Mythos (above Opus) could be a significant capability jump for Vigil if/when available via API. Monitor pricing and access.
workstreamTags.SECURE: Mythos leak is cybersecurity-focused; the model excels at finding vulnerabilities. Could be valuable for SECURE workstream auditing when available.
workstreamTags.CEO: AI model race is accelerating; all major players now at 1M context. Vigil runs on cutting-edge infrastructure; this is a differentiator worth mentioning to investors.

sources.title: MacRumors: Claude Code Rate Limit Bug
